name: Daisy-workflow Official
description: Local-disk fallback catalog. The default catalog source is the hosted https://daisy-workflow.web.app/plugin-catalog.json — this file is only used if that URL is unreachable, or if PLUGIN_CATALOG_FILE points to it explicitly (useful for air-gapped deployments). Mirror the schema below in any remote catalog you publish.

plugins.name: jira
plugins.summary: Jira Cloud connector — read / create / update / delete issues, JQL search, comments, transitions. One node, many operations.

plugins.name: google-sheets
plugins.summary: Google Sheets connector — read, append, update, clear, delete rows; create or inspect spreadsheets. Auth via Google service-account JSON.

plugins.name: microsoft-teams
plugins.summary: Microsoft Teams connector — list teams / channels / chats, create channels, send messages. Auth via Azure AD app registration (client credentials).

plugins.name: npm
plugins.summary: npm registry connector — read package metadata, search the index, fetch download stats. Public registry by default, private registries via Bearer token.
